mapper.select: SELECT * FROM MEMBER INNER JOIN PRODUCT ON(PRODUCT.MEM_NO = MEMBER.MEM_NO) WHERE PRODUCT.PROD_NO = #{prod_no};
SELECT PROG_SELL FROM MEMBER_PROGRESS WHERE MEM_NO = #{mem_no}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM PRODUCT WHERE MEM_NO = #{mem_no}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM PRODUCT WHERE MEM_NO = #{mem_no} AND PROD_TR_STATUS = 1
mapper.update: UPDATE MEMBER SET MEM_ALIAS = #{mem_alias}, PR_INFO = #{pr_info} WHERE MEM_NO = #{mem_no}
